message:
refactor(session): migrate flush.rs to shared quote_ident (bd-3sx5)

Replace all ad-hoc identifier quoting in flush.rs with the shared
quote_ident() utility from sqlmodel-core:

- LinkTableOp::Link/Unlink: INSERT INTO and DELETE FROM statements
- execute_insert_batch: Column list and INSERT INTO
- execute_delete_batch: DELETE FROM with IN clause and composite PK
- execute_update: UPDATE SET clause and WHERE clause

This ensures embedded double-quotes are properly escaped in table/column
names, preventing SQL injection and broken queries.

All 105 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
